security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Malicious actors can modify vote data before it reaches the contract.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not validate the integrity of the vote data.

assumptions: The data flow from the user interface to the contract is not protected against tampering.
The contract does not have a mechanism to detect tampered data.

mitigation.strategy: Implement data integrity mechanisms during data transmission and input validation.

description: An attacker may modify the vote data before it reaches the contract, causing unintended actions.

security_gap.gap_description: Lack of audit trail for votes makes it difficult to trace malicious actors.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system lacks logging and auditing capabilities for votes.

assumptions: The system does not record a complete and immutable audit trail of all votes.
The system does not provide mechanisms to verify the identity and authorization of voters.

mitigation.strategy: Implement logging and auditing of all votes with proper timestamping and user identification.

description: Attackers can cast votes and deny their participation in the voting process.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote information may be accessible to unauthorized parties.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not protect vote information adequately.

assumptions: The governance contract does not protect sensitive information, such as voting preferences.
Network traffic containing voting data is not encrypted.

mitigation.strategy: Implement encryption and access control measures to protect vote data during transmission and storage.

description: Sensitive voting data could be intercepted or leaked during transmission or storage.
